# Deeray — Minimalist Home Essentials
> Curating the future of domestic environments with precision, poise, and architectural integrity.

## About
https://deeray.store/about — Brand story, philosophy, and craftsmanship approach.

## Collections
https://deeray.store/collections — Browse all product categories.

### Categories
- https://deeray.store/collections/pure — Pure: Unadorned forms in their most honest state.
- https://deeray.store/collections/shield — Shield: Protection reimagined as object.
- https://deeray.store/collections/aura — Aura: Light as material, shadow as form.
- https://deeray.store/collections/carry — Carry: Vessels for what you bring with you.

## Products
https://deeray.store/collections — Product listings and details.

## Journal
https://deeray.store/blog — Essays on materiality, space, and the domestic landscape.

## Customer
https://deeray.store/contact — Contact information and support.
